headline: The AI Data Center Backlash Is Growing. Kevin O’Leary’s $1 Billion Stratos Project Reveals Why
summary: Artificial intelligence is setting off the biggest infrastructure buildout since the early internet boom. Only this time, the stakes are larger, the power demands are higher, and the local pushback is louder. The world’s biggest tech companies are racing to build AI capacity because whoever controls the computing power may control the next decade of ... The AI Data Center Backlash Is Growing. Kevin O’Leary’s $1 Billion Stratos Project Reveals Why

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Constellation Energy, Raises Price Target to $310
summary: Mizuho  analyst Anthony Crowdell   maintains Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $300 to $310.

headline: Constellation Energy enters 5 GW of nuclear, gas, battery capacity in PJM queue
summary: Some potential data center customers are pausing decision-making in the PJM Interconnection to see how the grid operator’s colocation and backstop auction rules shake out, company officials said.

raw.headline: Constellation Energy enters 5 GW of nuclear, gas, battery capacity in PJM queue

headline: Chips Push the S&P 500 to 7,400, Supercycle or the Last Act of a Bubble?
summary: Monday was one of those sessions where the headline number - a modest 0.2% gain on the S&P 500 - doesn't begin to capture what's actually happening underneath the surface.

headline: S&P 500 Settles Above 7,400: Investor Sentiment Improves Slightly, Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
summary: Stocks up, Dow closes above 7,400, Nasdaq jumps 4.5% and S&P 500 adds 2.3%. Trump rejects Iran's counter-proposal.
